g.onclick: sendPrompt('What fields are in the Customers table?')
sendPrompt('Explain the expression of interest stage and what data we capture')
sendPrompt('How are users assigned across the lead management system?')
sendPrompt('What are all the fields in the Budgetary Quotation table and how does it link to EOI?')
sendPrompt('What are all 22+ fields in the Tenders table in the redesigned architecture?')
sendPrompt('How does the corrigendums table work and what is the impact field?')
sendPrompt('When is the consortium_members table used?')
sendPrompt('How is competitor intelligence captured in the Competitors table?')
sendPrompt('Explain the Bidding Process table — the central orchestrator of qualification stages')
sendPrompt('What does the Stage History table record for each transition?')
sendPrompt('What does the Prequalification table check — turnover, experience, MSME?')
sendPrompt('What does the Technical Bid table record — compliance, deviations, result?')
sendPrompt('What financial fields does the Commercial Bid table contain — bid price, EMD, PBG?')
sendPrompt('How does the Stage Actions checklist work for each qualification stage?')
sendPrompt('How does the Evaluation Rounds table handle the clarification process with the customer?')
sendPrompt('What types of alerts does the system generate during evaluation?')
sendPrompt('What does the Results table record — L-position, L1 price, final outcome?')
sendPrompt('How does the Orders Received table link back to the tender and result?')
